name: Monday.com
description: Monitor Monday.com project management platform for team access and workspace security compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Monday.com
2. Click your avatar → Developers
3. Go to My Access Tokens
4. Copy your personal API token
5. Paste it below

credentialFields.label: API Token
credentialFields.helpText: Found in Monday.com → Avatar → Developers → My Access Tokens

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Reviews Monday.com workspace members with access to project management data

checks.name: App Availability
checks.description: Verifies Monday.com project management platform is operational
